overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a walk through a semi-covered urban market street with neon signage, entering a teal-lit garage workshop, and continuing through a narrow back alley with trash accumulation and a parked truck. The environment features dystopian cyberpunk architecture with concrete structures, mixed natural and artificial lighting, and scattered debris.

scene_state.functional_zone: semi-covered market street with shop fronts

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered street toward a large illuminated billboard

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with cybernetic implants walking ahead of the camera

entered.detail: orange and green garage front with parked car inside and MARK 24 signage above
small metal table with two chairs sitting on the concrete sidewalk
large illuminated advertisement showing a woman in revealing clothing with MILFGUARD text
massive concrete elevated highway or walkway casting shadows over the street

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a semi-covered urban market street with concrete overpasses above. The MARK 24 garage is visible on the right with outdoor seating in front. A pedestrian walks ahead toward a large illuminated billboard in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial area with large advertisement and garage entrance

events.description: NPC stops walking and turns to look around near the billboard
entering the garage workshop from the street

agents.ego_description: approaching the NPC near the billboard, then passing them to enter the garage workshop

notable_agents.action: heavily augmented character standing near the billboard, turning to look around

entered.detail: open doorway leading into the teal-lit workshop interior
metal shelving units visible inside the garage containing boxes and equipment
yellow and black vehicle lift equipment inside the workshop

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the NPC who has stopped near the MILFGUARD billboard. After passing the pedestrian, the camera enters a garage workshop with teal walls, revealing shelves and car lift equipment inside.

scene_state.functional_zone: vehicle workshop with teal walls and storage

events.description: turning to look around the garage interior before heading toward the exit

agents.ego_description: moving through the garage workshop, examining the interior equipment and walls before approaching the back exit

entered.detail: interior walls painted in distinctive teal color with industrial lighting above
tall metal racks filled with boxes, tires, and workshop supplies
colorful posters including a superhero figure taped to the concrete wall

segments.scene_description: Inside the teal-lit garage, the camera explores the workshop space with metal shelving, car lift equipment, and posters on the walls. The space is empty of people, and the camera moves toward the back exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: back service alley with trash accumulation

events.description: exiting the garage into the narrow back alley with concrete walls
passing closely alongside the parked truck in the narrow alley

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow back alley past trash bags and a vending machine, navigating around a parked truck

notable_agents.action: large dark truck parked in the alley blocking part of the path

entered.detail: tall concrete walls with graffiti and weathered surfaces lining the narrow passage
green illuminated vending machine against the wall
large accumulation of blue and green garbage bags stacked against the wall
bright yellow electrical or utility box mounted on the right wall

segments.scene_description: Exiting the garage, the scene transitions to a narrow back alley with high concrete walls, trash bag piles, and a vending machine. The camera walks past the debris and navigates around a large parked truck blocking part of the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a bustling, semi-covered urban market into the sterile interior of a workshop and finally out into a gritty back alley. It begins by moving through a concrete market street past the outdoor seating of the MARK 24 garage, following a pedestrian toward a large, illuminated billboard. As the camera passes the pedestrian, the scene shifts indoors into a teal-lit garage workshop filled with metal shelving, car lift equipment, and wall posters. The camera then navigates through this empty industrial space toward the rear exit, where the environment opens into a narrow alleyway enclosed by high concrete walls. Finally, the path leads past piles of trash bags and a vending machine before maneuvering around a large parked truck blocking the way.
